title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description:
Who we are:

VMD is an automotive engineering company focusing on delivering bespoke specialty vehicle and related solutions to clients in defence, public security and commercial industries.


What we offer:

· Competitive salary and benefits package

· Opportunities for career advancement and professional development

· Collaborative work environment that fosters innovation and communication

· Mentorship and guidance on best practices in automotive and mechanical design

· Opportunity to work on exciting projects at the forefront of automotive technology


About the role:

We are seeking a skilled and motivated Automotive Design Engineer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will be responsible for the design, development, and integration of vehicle systems and components, ensuring they meet contractual, budgetary and performance requirements.


Key Responsibilities:

· Define and manage vehicle configurations for different product variants

· Develop and optimise designs for mechanical and automotive systems

· Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams, including electrical and software engineers

· Perform simulation and analysis to validate design

· Create mock-up/prototype to gather data, evaluate performance, and refine designs.

· Participate in design reviews with various stakeholders

· Maintain thorough documentation of design processes, test results, and compliance with contractual and regulatory requirements

· Support manufacturing team with technical guidance to ensure smooth production processes and troubleshoot any design-related issues


Qualifications & Skills:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical/Mechatronics, Automotive Engineering or related field.
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant experience.
  • Strong understanding of vehicle systems, variant management, and BOM structures.
  • Proficiency in 3D CAD software (e.g. SolidWorks) and familiarity with simulation tools (e.g. FEA, CFD).
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with a focus on innovative solutions.
  • Effective communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to collaborate in a team-oriented environment.
  • Results-driven and detail-oriented mindset with a passion for engineering excellence and continuous improvement.

postedCompany.description:
VMD Pte. Ltd. is a privately owned and non-Government link Singapore Company founded in 1983. We are located at No.2 Tuas Crescent within the Jurong Industrial Estate. 

The company is one of the leading supplier of Diesel Engines, mainly IVECO AIFO engines (designed and manufactured in Italy), IVECO generating sets, Pump sets, Power Packs and IVECO spare parts for IVECO vehicles andengines. We currently also house Kohler Engines and Lombardini Engines and their corresponding spares.

VMD's extensive experience in engineering design and build enable us to undertake customization projects like amphibious vehicles, fire fighting vehicles, Foam tenders and many other engineerings first.

In corporation with the IVECO Group of Italy and Germany in the early 90s, we, VMD Pte. Ltd., are now one of the enforcing supplier and builder of military, fire fighting and security vehicles.Our products and services cover both local and overseas markets in Fire Services, Police and Security as well as Defence Industry customers.Participating in industrial and public tenders and projects both in Singapore and overseas through direct and indirect contacts by our Sales and Project Departments, are part of our activities in revenue generating.
postedCompany.name: VMD PTE. LTD.
